title: Suspicious outbound traffic flagged on web frontend
observations: Heuristic flagged periodic outbound connections as 'possible beaconing'.
Destinations resolve to Google public DNS and the Microsoft Update service.
Both destinations are on the organization's allowlist.
No malware detection, no file changes, no credential activity.
_demo_note: False positive: indicators are whitelisted/benign in the IOC DB. Triage should classify and CLOSE without recruiting any specialists — proves proportionality at the bottom of the scale.
